{"id":"project-LICHEN-cht2","title":"SourceRoutingHeader silently misparsing compressed addresses","description":"File: python/src/lichen/rpl/routing.py:51-66

The SourceRoutingHeader.from_ext_data() assumes all addresses are uncompressed (CmprI=CmprE=0) but doesn't validate this assumption. If a packet with compressed addresses is received, it will silently misparse.

RFC 6554 Section 3:
- CmprI (4 bits): number of prefix octets elided from internal addresses
- CmprE (4 bits): number of prefix octets elided from the last address

Current code:
```python
addr_bytes = data[_SRH_FIELDS_LENGTH:]  # Bytes after the 6-byte header
if len(addr_bytes) % 16 != 0:
    raise RoutingError("source-route address list is not 16-byte aligned")
addresses = [
    IPv6Address(addr_bytes[i : i + 16])
    for i in range(0, len(addr_bytes), 16)
]
```

Problems:
1. CmprI and CmprE at data[2] and data[3] are ignored
2. If CmprI > 0, addresses are < 16 bytes, causing misalignment or wrong parsing
3. The length check will pass if compressed length happens to be 16-aligned

Fix: Validate CmprI == 0 and CmprE == 0:
```python
cmpr = data[2]
if cmpr != 0:  # CmprI or CmprE non-zero
    raise RoutingError("compressed source routing headers not supported")
```","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:26.389174Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:26.389212Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-cht2","title":"SourceRoutingHeader silently misparsing compressed addresses","description":"File: python/src/lichen/rpl/routing.py:51-66

The SourceRoutingHeader.from_ext_data() assumes all addresses are uncompressed (CmprI=CmprE=0) but doesn't validate this assumption. If a packet with compressed addresses is received, it will silently misparse.

RFC 6554 Section 3:
- CmprI (4 bits): number of prefix octets elided from internal addresses
- CmprE (4 bits): number of prefix octets elided from the last address

Current code:
```python
addr_bytes = data[_SRH_FIELDS_LENGTH:]  # Bytes after the 6-byte header
if len(addr_bytes) % 16 != 0:
    raise RoutingError("source-route address list is not 16-byte aligned")
addresses = [
    IPv6Address(addr_bytes[i : i + 16])
    for i in range(0, len(addr_bytes), 16)
]
```

Problems:
1. CmprI and CmprE at data[2] and data[3] are ignored
2. If CmprI > 0, addresses are < 16 bytes, causing misalignment or wrong parsing
3. The length check will pass if compressed length happens to be 16-aligned

Fix: Validate CmprI == 0 and CmprE == 0:
```python
cmpr = data[2]
if cmpr != 0:  # CmprI or CmprE non-zero
    raise RoutingError("compressed source routing headers not supported")
```","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:26.389174Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:39.165438738Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:39.165438738Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:25:39.165438738Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:39.165438738Z"}
